name: 3pk Sphere Burst Battery LED Outdoor Light Stakes Black/Clear - Threshold™
description:
Light up your outdoor space for a beautiful look with the 3-Piece Sphere Burst Battery LED Outdoor Light Stakes from Threshold™. The battery-operated light stakes feature a sleek metal body with a sphere burst design on the top for a gorgeous touch. Designed with integrated LED bulbs that light up automatically, these weather-resistant light stakes require 9 AA batteries to illuminate and decorate your courtyard and garden paths.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
